deny.name: components-never-import-stores-directly-from-other-views
deny.reason: View components must not cross-import other view components — compose in App.tsx instead

deny.name: stores-never-import-components
deny.reason: Stores are data layer — must not depend on UI components

deny.name: types-never-import-stores
deny.reason: Type definitions must remain pure — no runtime dependencies

deny.name: types-never-import-components
deny.reason: Type definitions must remain pure — no UI dependencies

deny.name: styles-never-import-components
deny.reason: Style tokens are leaf nodes — no reverse dependencies

deny.name: ui-primitives-never-import-views
deny.reason: Shared UI primitives must not depend on specific view components

deny.name: ui-primitives-never-import-installed
deny.reason: Shared UI primitives must not depend on specific view components

deny.name: ui-primitives-never-import-stores
deny.reason: UI primitives should be stateless — pass data via props, not store access
